channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Cancer drug facility, religious site hit in Israeli-US strikes on Iran
item.description: The Iranian government said the company's drug production line has been damaged, as no diplomatic solution is in sight.

item.title: Will China join Pakistan-led efforts to mediate US-Iran peace?
item.description: Pakistan's Deputy PM Ishaq Dar visits China after Islamabad talks to broker negotiations between the US and Iran.

item.title: US defence secretary says next few days in Iran war will be ‘decisive’
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warned the coming days of the war with Iran will be ‘decisive.'

item.title: Are ICE detention deaths caused by systemic failures?
item.description: Mexican official Vanessa Calva Ruiz says the deaths of immigrants in ICE detention are caused by systemic failures.

item.title: Three Indonesian peacekeepers killed by Israeli attacks in Lebanon
item.description: Two Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon have killed three Indonesian UN peacekeepers in the past 48 hours.

item.title: Iranian rescuers save two civilians from rubble after US-Israeli strikes
item.description: Footage shows Iranian Red Crescent Society rescuers and firemen saving two civilians from underneath the rubble.

item.title: ‘AI helped pick the first thousand targets in Iran’
item.description: ‘AI helped pick the first thousand targets in Iran’

item.title: Drones strike Russia’s Ust-Luga port again as EU officials visit Ukraine
item.description: Attacks come as Ukraine says its air defences shot down 267 out of 289 drones launched by Russia overnight.

item.title: Italy denies the US military use of its air bases to attack Iran
item.description: Italian press reports that the government has refuse to authorise US to land bombers at a base in Sicily

item.title: ‘Iranians don’t consider Trump’s 15-point plan as beginning of diplomacy’
item.description: ‘Iranians don’t consider Trump’s 15-point plan as beginning of a diplomatic track’
